homePage.heroSubtitle: Calculate dimensions for social media, video, photography, and screens
homePage.whatIsAspectRatioText: An aspect ratio describes the proportional relationship between width and height. Written as W:H (e.g., 16:9), it tells you the shape of a screen, image, or video frame. A 16:9 ratio means for every 16 units of width, the height is 9 units — the standard for HD and 4K video. A 1:1 ratio is a perfect square, used for Instagram feed posts.
homePage.howToUseStep1Text: Enter your original dimensions (the ratio locks automatically), then type a new width or height — the other dimension calculates instantly. Pick a platform preset to auto-fill recommended dimensions.
homePage.howToUseStep2Text: Enter any width and height to discover the simplified ratio, decimal value, closest standard match, and CSS padding-bottom value. Upload an image to instantly detect its dimensions.
homePage.howToUseStep3Text: Upload any image and choose where you want to use it — social media, websites, print, or personal use. Get instant recommendations with crop analysis and one-click dimension copying.

ratioPage.readyToCalculate: Ready to calculate {label} dimensions? Our free calculator handles any width or height instantly.
ratioPage.paddingBottomTrick: The CSS padding-bottom trick creates a responsive container that maintains a {label} aspect ratio:

blogPage.readyToPractice: Ready to put this into practice?
blogPage.tryCalculator: Try the Free Aspect Ratio Calculator →

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Aspect Ratio Calculator. We collect minimal data and respect your privacy.
privacy.s1p1: Aspect Ratio Calculator ("we", "us", or "our") operates aspect-ratio-calculator.com (the "Service"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our Service.
privacy.s1p2: We are committed to protecting your privacy. This tool is designed to work with minimal data — the calculator runs entirely in your browser and we do not store your calculation inputs or results.
privacy.s1p3: This Privacy Policy complies with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs), and with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR 2016/679) where applicable. If you have any concerns, please contact us using the feedback widget on the calculator page.
privacy.s2list1: No account registration or login is required
privacy.s2list2: Your calculation inputs (dimensions, ratios, images) are processed locally in your browser and never transmitted to our servers
privacy.s2list3: We do not store any personal identification information
privacy.s2list4: We do not sell, trade, or rent your data to third parties
privacy.s2analytics: We use Vercel Analytics to collect anonymous, aggregated data about how the Service is used — including page views, general geographic region (country level only), device type, and referring source. Vercel Analytics does not use cookies, does not fingerprint your browser, and does not collect personally identifiable information (PII).
privacy.s2ga4clarity: With your consent, we also use Google Analytics 4 and Microsoft Clarity to understand visitor behaviour in more detail. These tools set cookies and may collect your approximate location and device information. You can accept or decline these cookies via the cookie banner shown on your first visit, or change your preference at any time via the Cookie Settings link in the footer.
privacy.s2feedback: If you voluntarily submit feedback through our feedback widget, we collect the content of your message and, if provided, your email address. This information is used solely to respond to your feedback. It is transmitted via Resend (a transactional email service) and is not shared with any other third party.
privacy.s3p1: We use two categories of cookies. Essential storage (always active): your theme preference (light or dark mode) is stored in localStorage and never transmitted to us; the PWA service worker caches application assets for offline use only. Analytics cookies (consent required): Google Analytics 4 and Microsoft Clarity set cookies only after you accept them via the cookie banner. You can decline or withdraw consent at any time — the calculator works fully regardless of your cookie choice.
privacy.s3p2: If you install the Service as a PWA (Progressive Web App), a service worker is registered in your browser to enable offline functionality. The service worker caches application assets only; it does not collect or transmit any personal data.
privacy.s4intro: The Service uses the following third-party services:
privacy.s4disclaimer: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third-party services. We encourage you to review their individual privacy policies.
privacy.s5intro: Under the Australian Privacy Principles, you have the right to:
privacy.s5list1: Request access to any personal information we hold about you
privacy.s5list2: Request correction of any inaccurate personal information
privacy.s5list3: Request deletion of any personal information you have voluntarily provided (e.g., via the feedback form)
privacy.s5list4: Lodge a complaint with the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC) at oaic.gov.au if you believe we have breached your privacy
privacy.s5contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us via the feedback widget on the calculator page.
privacy.s5introGdpr: If you are in the EU/EEA or UK, you also have the right to:
privacy.s5gdpr1: Data portability — receive your personal data in a structured, machine-readable format (Art. 20 GDPR)
privacy.s5gdpr2: Restriction of processing — ask us to pause processing of your data in certain circumstances (Art. 18 GDPR)
privacy.s5gdpr3: Object to processing — object to processing based on legitimate interests (Art. 21 GDPR)
privacy.s5gdpr4: Not be subject to solely automated decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects (Art. 22 GDPR) — we do not carry out any such automated decision-making
privacy.s5gdpr5: Lodge a complaint with your local EU/EEA Data Protection Authority (DPA) — find your DPA at edpb.europa.eu/about-edpb/about-edpb/members_en
privacy.s5bIntro: Where GDPR applies, we rely on the following lawful bases:
privacy.s5bList1: Essential operations (theme preference, offline cache): Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)) — necessary to deliver the Service you requested
privacy.s5bList2: Analytics cookies (Google Analytics & Clarity): Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)) — only set after you accept via the cookie banner
privacy.s5bList3: Feedback email: Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)) — to respond to your message
privacy.s6text: Feedback form submissions (including any email address you provide) are retained only as long as necessary to address your enquiry, after which they are deleted. Anonymous analytics data (aggregated page view counts) may be retained indefinitely as it contains no personally identifiable information. Analytics cookie data collected via Google Analytics or Microsoft Clarity is retained per each provider's default retention settings (up to 14 months for GA4; up to 30 days for Clarity session recordings).
privacy.s7text: The Service is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will take steps to delete it promptly.
privacy.s8text: The Service is operated from Australia. If you are accessing the Service from outside Australia, your information may be processed in Australia, the United States (Vercel, Google, Microsoft), and other countries where our service providers operate. Australia does not have an EU adequacy decision. Where GDPR applies, transfers to our US-based service providers (Vercel, Google, Microsoft) are covered by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) adopted by those providers. By using the optional feedback form, you acknowledge that your message may be processed in these countries.
privacy.s9text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal, operational, or regulatory reasons. When we make changes, we will update the effective date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s10text: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please use the feedback widget on the calculator page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaTitle: Terms of Service | Aspect Ratio Calculator
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for Aspect Ratio Calculator. Free online tool governed by Australian law.
terms.s1text: By accessing or using Aspect Ratio Calculator at aspect-ratio-calculator.com (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Service. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.
terms.s2p1: Aspect Ratio Calculator is a free online Progressive Web App (PWA) that calculates, converts, and identifies aspect ratios for images, videos, and screens. No account or sign-up is required to use the free tier.
terms.s2p2: We may offer a Pro tier ("Pro") with additional features for a one-time purchase price. Current pricing and features for Pro are displayed at the point of purchase. The Service is provided for informational and utility purposes only; results are provided as a convenience and should be independently verified for mission-critical applications.
terms.s3p1: The Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranty of any kind, express or implied. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we disclaim all warranties, including but not limited to:
terms.s3list1: Warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose
terms.s3list2: Accuracy, completeness, or reliability of calculation results
terms.s3list3: Uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Service
terms.s3list4: That the Service will meet your specific requirements
terms.s3list5: Security or absence of viruses or harmful components
terms.s3acl: Nothing in these Terms excludes, restricts, or modifies any consumer guarantee, right, or remedy conferred by the Australian Consumer Law that cannot lawfully be excluded, restricted, or modified.
terms.s4p1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall Aspect Ratio Calculator, its operators, affiliates, licensors, service providers, employees, agents, officers, or directors be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to:
terms.s4list1: Loss of profits, revenue, or data
terms.s4list2: Business interruption or loss of goodwill
terms.s4list4: Any damages arising from reliance on calculation results
terms.s4liability: Maximum Aggregate Liability: Our total aggregate liability to you for any and all claims arising from or related to the use of the Service shall not exceed the amount you actually paid for the Service during the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the claim. For users of the free tier, this limit is AUD $0.00. For Pro tier users, this limit is the one-time Pro purchase price you paid.
terms.s4closing: These limitations apply regardless of the legal theory on which the claim is based. Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain warranties or damages; in such cases, our liability will be limited to the greatest extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.s5p1: All content on the Service — including but not limited to the software, user interface, design, text, graphics, and data tables — is the exclusive property of Aspect Ratio Calculator and is protected by Australian and international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.s5p2: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to access and use the Service for your personal, non-commercial purposes. This licence does not include:
terms.s5list1: Reproducing or distributing any part of the Service
terms.s5list2: Creating derivative works based on the Service
terms.s5list3: Commercially exploiting any content or features of the Service without written permission
terms.s5list4: Reverse engineering or decompiling the software
terms.s6intro: You agree not to use the Service in any way that:
terms.s6list1: Involves automated scraping, crawling, or data extraction beyond normal browser usage
terms.s6list2: Attempts to circumvent, disable, or interfere with security features
terms.s6list3: Places unreasonable load on the Service infrastructure
terms.s6list4: Violates any applicable law or regulation
terms.s6list5: Infringes on the rights of any third party
terms.s7text: The Service may contain links to or integrate with third-party websites or services (including WhatsApp, Telegram, and social media platforms for sharing). These are provided for your convenience only. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party services. Your use of third-party services is governed solely by the terms of those services.
terms.s8text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time at our sole discretion. When we make material changes, we will update the effective date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Service after any such modification constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms. We encourage you to review these Terms periodically.
terms.s9text: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of New South Wales, Australia, and the Commonwealth of Australia, without regard to conflict of law principles. The Australian Consumer Law applies to the extent applicable. Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of New South Wales, Australia.
terms.s10text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please use the feedback widget available on the main calculator page.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Preferences
cookieConsent.body: We use Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity to understand how visitors use this site. These tools set cookies and collect anonymous usage data. You can accept or decline — your calculator always works regardless of your choice.
cookieConsent.analyticsCookiesDesc: Google Analytics & Microsoft Clarity — helps us improve the calculator. You can change this at any time.
cookieConsent.essentialDesc: Theme preference & offline cache — always active, cannot be disabled.
